title: Round 2: Mixed OHU
purpose: Compare overdeveloped, healthy, and underdeveloped reactions under the same pressure.

questions.prompt: Pressure: the routine breaks. Response: 'Move. I’ll handle it myself.' Which OHU expression is this?
questions.hint: Overdeveloped expression overuses the trait until it crowds out regulation.

questions.prompt: Pressure: the routine breaks. Response: 'Okay. What matters most right now?' Which OHU expression is this?
questions.hint: Healthy expression keeps direction while adapting.

questions.prompt: Pressure: the routine breaks. Response: 'Forget it. Nobody listens anyway.' Which OHU expression is this?
questions.hint: Underdeveloped expression collapses away from the trait’s useful function.

questions.prompt: Which response best reframes a setback as learning instead of failure?
options: What can this teach me about my support system?
questions.answer: What can this teach me about my support system?
questions.hint: Course 10 treats setbacks as feedback for adjustment.
